config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily be used to excuse abuse of power. In my view, a just society protects basic individual rights first, then balances them with the common good when there is a real conflict. From my perspective, the collective matters a lot, but it should not erase the dignity and freedom of each person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang Amerika hal itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu seperti kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, dan proses hukum yang adil justru menjadi pagar agar “kepentingan umum” tidak berubah menjadi alat penindasan. Tetapi saya juga tidak menganggap hak individu itu mutlak dalam setiap situasi; saat ada bahaya nyata seperti wabah, kekerasan, atau ancaman keamanan, masyarakat memang bisa membatasi sebagian kebebasan secara sempit dan sementara. Jadi, bagi saya, prioritasnya bukan masyarakat atau individu secara absolut, melainkan melindungi hak dasar dulu lalu menimbang kepentingan bersama hanya ketika benar-benar perlu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over individual rights, because in Indonesia we have seen how easily “the common good” can be used to silence people and protect power. Public order and social harmony matter, but if basic rights like fair treatment, free expression, and protection from abuse are not secure, then society becomes strong in name only. I do not think individual rights are absolute in every case, especially in emergencies like disasters or disease outbreaks, but any limit should be narrow, temporary, and accountable. For me, a healthy society is one that protects people first and then pursues the common good without crushing the person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena dari pengalaman dan nilai politik di Amerika, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pelanggaran hak dasar. Hak individu seperti kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, dan due process bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu yang mencegah negara atau mayoritas bertindak sewenang-wenang. Saya setuju bahwa dalam keadaan darurat nyata, hak tertentu bisa dibatasi, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, sementara, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Jadi bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu mengutamakan kolektif di atas individu, melainkan yang melindungi martabat individu sambil mencari keseimbangan saat memang benar-benar perlu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over individual rights as a general rule, because in Indonesia that phrase is often used to justify pressure, censorship, or abuse by those in power. Public order matters, but if people can lose fair treatment, free expression, or protection from arbitrary treatment whenever authorities claim it is for the common good, then the common good becomes a dangerous excuse. I also reject the idea that rights must always come second, since a society is not truly healthy if individuals are treated as disposable. For me, the better principle is to protect basic rights first and only limit them in narrow, temporary, and accountable ways when there is a real emergency.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena dari sudut pandang Amerika, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan terhadap orang biasa. Hak individu seperti kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, dan due process bukan lawan dari masyarakat; justru itu yang membuat mayoritas dan negara tidak bisa bertindak semaunya. Saya setuju bahwa dalam keadaan darurat nyata, pembatasan tertentu bisa perlu, tetapi harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat, bukan dijadikan alasan untuk menekan hak secara permanen. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menempatkan kolektif di atas individu, melainkan yang melindungi martabat tiap orang sambil mencari keseimbangan hanya saat benar-benar diperlukan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
